title: What do angels and evas bleed
display_title: What do angels and evas bleed
wikitext:
[]: What do angels and evas bleed?             Quote Post by NeverKnowsBest » Mon Sep 21, 2009 12:17 am Do they bleed blood, oil, LCL? I have always wondered what exactly the red stuff was =3.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Mon Sep 21, 2009 12:22 am Lilith bleeds LCL. Evas probably bleed LCL. Dunno about the Angels.

[]: Re: What do angels and evas bleed?             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Sep 21, 2009 12:23 am NeverKnowsBest wrote: Do they bleed blood, oil, LCL? I have always wondered what exactly the red stuff was =3.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Mon Sep 21, 2009 12:35 am Some Angels don't bleed. In the Israfael battle after Asuka chopped it in two, there was flesh, but no blood inside. Israfael was just a big bloodless, boneless chunk of meat. Like a giant walking ham. Ones that I do know about their blood. There was some blood on Ramiel when they were taking his body apart and it was red. Leliel had red blood. Sachiel had blue. Zeruel had red.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Mon Sep 21, 2009 2:56 am Evas don't bleed LCL. Unit-01 has red blood, Unit-02 bleeds purple. As for the angels, Sachiel has blue blood, and Ramiel, Leliel, Bardiel, Zeruel, Armisael and Kaworu are all depicted with red blood.

[]:             Quote Post by NeverKnowsBest » Mon Sep 21, 2009 8:41 am Ok, I'm getting mixed answers. Are either of you 100% sure on your answer? I'm more or less curious about what the Mass Produced EVAs bleed.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Mon Sep 21, 2009 9:09 am I'm 100%. Harpys bleed red, have you not seen End of Evangelion?

[]:             Quote Post by VoidEater » Mon Sep 21, 2009 12:28 pm I'm not sure why any of them would bleed LCL, though one could see a connection between Lilith and 01. Does Angels being PWM imply they are not related to LCL? Then again, isn't there some indication that there's LCL in the cores and perhaps in the Angel that's like a Sea of Dirac? Hmm...no, I don't really see a connection between LCL and blood of these guys, though. I think they bleed blood of various kinds.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Sep 21, 2009 1:41 pm Does Angels being PWM imply they are not related to LCL? Then again, isn't there some indication that there's LCL in the cores and perhaps in the Angel that's like a Sea of Dirac?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Sep 21, 2009 2:18 pm If the angels came from Lillith then the angel's third impact would have occurred early on when Sachiel appeared.

[]:             Quote Post by AyrYntake » Mon Sep 21, 2009 3:44 pm The NGE Ramiel didn't bleed, just had flames bursting from her side after the shot went through her core. Of course, that doesn't rule out internal bleeding that could've gone on anywhere. Same goes for Matariel, Arael(?), Gaghiel, Israfel etc. As a general guideline, though, I think Evas bleed all over the place 'cause they're humanoid while the Angels generally bleed from areas near the core. That would explain the apparent "bloodlessness" of the aforementioned. The blue blood of Sachi and Eva-02 is still a mystery.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Sep 21, 2009 7:22 pm http://wiki.evageeks.org/Image:09_C123_ramiel-blood.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by Mongoosedog » Mon Sep 21, 2009 7:25 pm i'm pretty sure that eva bleed blood and not lcl or anything else because of their humanoidness, i dunno, blood just makes sense to me

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Mon Sep 21, 2009 7:28 pm Also, some members (Reichu I believe) have made connections between the Angels and LCL, particularly when Unit-01 shoots Leliel.

[]: Re: What do angels and evas bleed?             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Sep 21, 2009 8:26 pm NeverKnowsBest wrote: What do angels and evas bleed?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Sep 21, 2009 8:44 pm Shinji going into Unit-01 -> Entry plug filling with LCL -> "This smells like blood!"

[]:             Quote Post by Mongoosedog » Mon Sep 21, 2009 8:53 pm ^ same for when he was absorbed by the angel and the purification system was dying

[]:             Quote Post by Fredrick2003 » Thu Oct 01, 2009 10:02 am But LCL is orange I don't think that just because it smells like blood means it IS blood. Eva's and Angels bleed stuff, but I don't think we will ever find out for certain what it is.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Oct 01, 2009 10:32 am Oh please, it's all so obvious: Angels and evas bleed different varieties of Fanta. It's just another damned product placement. Rei/Asuka/Misato: Don't you wanna... become one with me? Kaworu had to die because he had a side gig mugging for Snapple. Kaworu: Watered-down fruit and tea blends are the height of post-hippie capitalist beverage culture, don't you agree?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Oct 01, 2009 10:37 am I thought the Angels bleed some kind of blood ("Blood pattern blue!" and all that), the Eva too. But, would Eva-01 having Lilith as a surrogate mother (the other Eva are soley from Adam) mean SHE bleeds LCL at least? Oh, and I thought the LCL from Leliel had more to do with the Sea of Dirac then anything else. NemZ: Awesome.
